scripts.build: esbuild src/popup/popup.ts src/background/background.ts --bundle --outdir=build --target=es2020 && copyfiles -u 1 src/manifest.json src/popup/*.html src/popup/*.css src/icons/**/* build/
scripts.publish: npm run build && mkdir -p release && (cd build && zip -r ../release/dedupe.zip *) && zip -r release/dedupe-source.zip README.md *.json src/*
